app.title: The Timeline Museum — Art History
loading.error: Could not load the collection — check your connection and try again.
gate.touch: It looks like you’re visiting from a phone or tablet. The museum is a first-person 3D experience that needs a keyboard, a mouse and a desktop-class GPU — please come back on a desktop or laptop computer.
gate.webgl: Your browser doesn’t support WebGL 2, which the 3D galleries require. Please use a current version of Chrome, Edge, Firefox or Safari.
gate.pointerlock: Your browser doesn’t support pointer lock, which first-person controls require. Please use a current version of Chrome, Edge, Firefox or Safari.
gate.sub: A first-person walk through 16 periods of art history — 231 artists, 3,100 paintings from Wikimedia Commons.
hint.timeline: scroll to zoom · drag to pan
help.title: Controls
help.inspect: inspect the painting you're looking at
help.fav: heart it — it hangs in your salon
help.vr: Enter VR on the entry screen — left stick walks, right stick turns
help.share: The link in the address bar always points at the gallery you're standing in — copy it to share.
tour.hint: T or ESC ends the tour · click to continue on foot
placard.hint: E closes the placard · you can keep walking
fav.add: ♡ F — hang it in your salon
fav.added: ♥ hangs in your salon · F takes it down
fav.emptySub: press F on a painting you love
map.title: Museum map — every gallery, in order
map.hint: click a gallery to jump there · M closes
qj.empty: No artist in the collection matches.
themes.title: Themed walks
settings.title: Settings
settings.note: Quality takes effect the next time you step inside the museum.
quality.very-low.name: Very Low
quality.very-low.hint: Reduced resolution, no shadows or reflections — for very weak machines
quality.low.name: Low
quality.low.hint: Native resolution; still no shadows or mirror floor
quality.medium.name: Medium
quality.medium.hint: Soft shadows and antialiasing; matte floor instead of a mirror
quality.high.name: High
quality.high.hint: Full lighting and the mirror floor — the intended look
quality.very-high.name: Very High
quality.very-high.hint: Maximum texture, shadow and reflection detail
